title: EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE - 211info
text: YAMHILL COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rapid identification, support, assessment and treatment for teenagers and young adults who are experiencing the early signs of psychosis. Services include education about psychosis; medication along with medication monitoring; individual and group counseling; multi-family groups; occupational therapy; family education and support; vocational training and life-skills coaching; 24/7 crisis services; connections to community resources. 627 NE Evans Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Ages 12-30 who have had a first episode of psychosis within the last 12 months or who are experiencing early at-risk symptoms for psychosis and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 583-7523 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 583-7523 Jordan Andrews Noah [email protected] Referrals (503) 583-5527 Crisis Hotline (503) 434-7523 Weekdays 24/7 Crisis Line (844) 842-8200 Evenings and weekends INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurances. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: Insurance cards if applicable, proof of income for sliding scale AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Early Intervention for Mental Illness Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ABACUS FOR YOUTH AND ADULTS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YAMHILL COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - YOUTH MENTAL HEALTH AND SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - CHEMICAL DEPENDENCY SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. YAMHILL COUNTY BEHAVIORAL HEALTH
